title: Verifier v1 result schema (Research Governance v0.1, PR 15 + MVP-0.1.1 + MVP-0.1.6)
description: Output of `scripts/verify_candidate.sh --json <path>`. Records the deterministic verdict of one verification run. Schema 1.3 adds the four critic-state fields (MVP-0.1.1) and the abnormal-exit metadata (MVP-0.1.6).

schema_version.description: Verifier result schema version. Current is 1.3 (MVP-0.1.6). 1.0 = PR 15 baseline; 1.1 = + critic_report_present; 1.2 = + critic_report_is_template/critic_completed/critic_status (MVP-0.1.1); 1.3 = + abnormal_exit_stage/abnormal_exit_code (MVP-0.1.6).

candidate_id.description: Identifier from <candidate-dir>/manifest.toml::[candidate].id; falls back to the basename of <candidate-dir> when running without --candidate.

candidate_dir.description: Path of the candidate directory, or null when the verifier was invoked tree-level (no --candidate).

reasons.description: Empty for PASS_SHAPE_ONLY. One entry per failed/HRR check otherwise. For ABNORMAL_EXIT, contains a single entry naming the stage and bash exit code.

checks.description: Per-check sub-statuses. Keys are the check names; values are PASS/FAIL/HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED/SKIPPED/UNKNOWN. Absence of a key means the check did not run.

axioms_allowed.description: Allowed axioms for the closed final term, mirrored from spec/target.toml::[axioms].allowed at run time.

spec_version.description: Value of spec/target.toml::[meta].spec_version at run time. Should equal version_manifest.toml::[snapshot].target_spec_version.

critic_report_present.description: Whether <candidate-dir>/critic_report.md exists at all. Added in schema 1.1.

critic_report_is_template.description: Whether the existing critic_report.md is detected as the empty template (TEMPLATE FILE banner / critic_status: TEMPLATE / per-section Template placeholders). Added in schema 1.2 (MVP-0.1.1). Cross-checked by scripts/validate_critic_report.py.

critic_completed.description: Whether the critic_report.md parses as completed (not_template AND all six attack sections present AND verdict block present AND verdict's critic_status in {pass, fail}). Added in schema 1.2 (MVP-0.1.1).

critic_status.description: Verifier-emitted critic state: 'not_run' whenever the report is template, incomplete, or absent (even if the report file's critic_status: line says pass); otherwise the parsed verdict. Downstream tooling MUST read this AND critic_completed (NOT just critic_report_present) to decide whether the candidate has been critic-cleared. Added in schema 1.2 (MVP-0.1.1).

completed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at end of the run. Optional; verify_candidate.sh emits it for human inspection but it is NOT part of the canonical hash for Rule 13 reproducibility.

abnormal_exit_stage.description: When status='ABNORMAL_EXIT' (MVP-0.1.6 EXIT trap), the value of the last-entered progress_stage at the time the script aborted. Absent on normal exit.

abnormal_exit_code.description: When status='ABNORMAL_EXIT', the bash exit code that triggered the trap. Absent on normal exit.

git_commit.description: v0.4.2 Track B: lower-case hex of the git commit on which the verifier was invoked. Optional; emitted when scripts/verify_candidate.sh can resolve `git rev-parse HEAD`.

allOf.description: Cross-field rule: when critic_status = pass, the report MUST have parsed as completed.
Cross-field rule: when critic_status = fail, the report MUST have parsed as completed.
Cross-field rule: when critic_status = pass or fail, the report MUST NOT be a template.
